onboarding.step1_desc: Kookers connects amateur chefs with foodies who want to discover new flavors.
onboarding.step2_desc: Order dishes or desserts based on your culinary preferences and location.
onboarding.step3_desc: Your chef or our delivery partners bring your order straight to your door.
onboarding.step4_desc: Savor your dish or dessert in peace.

auth.error: An error occurred, please try again!
auth.tagline: Kookers connects amateur chefs and foodies nearby. Join us!

home.publishRetry: An error occurred while publishing your dish, retrying in 10 seconds
home.publishError: An error occurred while publishing your dish, please try again later

food.loginToOrder: Please sign in to place an order
food.loginToReport: Please sign in to report this dish

vendor.title: Sales
vendor.healthReminder: The health of our community members matters to us, so we remind you to wear your cooking gear (mask, gloves, hairnet) when cooking for a member.
vendor.dishCancelledByBuyer: The dish has been cancelled by the buyer
vendor.dishDeliveredAndRated: The dish has been delivered and rated

messages.title: Messages
messages.startChatCta: Order a dish to start chatting

settings.paymentsDesc: All the credit cards you've added and used to pay within Kookers.
settings.walletDesc: Your wallet balance and its transactions. When you sell on Kookers, the money first lands in your wallet before you can withdraw it to a bank account.
settings.bankAccountsDesc: All the bank accounts used to withdraw money from your wallet. Your IBANs are only used for this purpose.
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out of Kookers?
settings.photoPermissionBody: You denied photo access. Please update the permissions in your phone settings.

empty.homeSubtitle: There are no listings around you yet. Try widening your search area.

publish.platformFeeInfo: This is the amount the Kookers platform will take as an operating fee. It represents 15% of the sold plate / portion price.
publish.youReceiveInfo: This is the amount you will receive for each portion or dish you sell via Kookers, after operating fees are deducted.

errorView.generic: An error occurred, please try again!

signup.title: Sign up
signup.byContinuingPrefix: By tapping Create account or sign in, you accept our
signup.privacyIntro: , To learn more about how your data is used, see our

terms.learnMorePrefix: To learn more about your rights and how your data is used, see our
terms.dataUsage: Kookers uses your data to provide and improve its services. You have the right to access and rectify the information about you, to delete your account, and to object to the use of your data for commercial purposes. You can exercise these rights at any time by contacting our

notifications.body: We'd like to send you notifications to keep you informed about what's happening on Kookers.

payment.sameDayNotice: If you order on the same day, the app allows a 3-hour lead time so the chef has time to buy fresh ingredients and cook without stress.

guidelines.gloves: You agree to wear gloves and a hairnet when cooking for community members.
guidelines.mask: You agree to wear a mask when cooking to protect the health of other users.
guidelines.hygiene: You agree to maintain the hygiene of your kitchen, your utensils, and the cold and hot chain when cooking for community members.

reports.descriptionHint: Add a description of the report

completed.title: Order completed
completed.body: An order has just been completed.

newRating.title: Rating
newRating.body: You received a new rating for one of your orders.

accepted.title: Order accepted
accepted.body: Your order has been accepted by the chef.

chefCancelled.title: Order cancelled
chefCancelled.body: The chef unfortunately had to cancel your order.

upgrade.title: Update required
upgrade.body: A new version of Kookers is available. Please update the app to continue.
